title: Indulgent Kenyan Dates Crumble
description: A rich, crumbly dessert celebrating Kenyan flavors with sweet dates, fragrant spices, and a glossy apricot glaze.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine dates, flour, oats, brown sugar, cinnamon, ginger and lemon juice; mix until well coated.
Add cold butter pieces and work with your fingertips until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Transfer the crumb mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish and press down evenly.
Bake for 20 minutes, then remove from oven and drizzle apricot jam over the top, spreading it lightly.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the jam is bubbly and the crumble is golden.
Let the crumble cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top and serve warm or at room temperature.
